CustomField.description: NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt DeveloperName key that, when a positive spatial intersection is detected, causes this permit type to be included in the permit record collection regardless of sector/project-type match. Used by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator GIS bridge. Example: NWI_WETLANDS triggers CWA Section 404 Permit; EPA_TRIBAL_LANDS triggers NHPA Section 106 Consultation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: GIS layer key (NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt DeveloperName) that auto-triggers this permit when spatial intersection is detected.
CustomField.label: GIS Layer Key
